name: The Size App
description:
One app. Endless possibilities.

Imagine a phone that can scan anyone - yourself included - and change their size with a single tap. Shrink down to bug-sized and explore a world of giants, or grow to towering heights and watch the world tremble. You can only alter two people at once, and once resized, they’re stuck that way for 24 hours. No undo. No re-scan.

But the power is yours... and it's addictive.

Unaware scenarios. Power trips. Helplessness. Curiosity. Control.

Your story starts with one scan. Just don’t get careless...
creator: GigaChadChad
